metadata.semantic_description:
Sex: Female
Highly agreeable Agreeableness (88th pct) — Cooperative, trusting, empathetic
Highly disorganised Conscientiousness (14th pct) — Flexible, spontaneous, disorganised
Introverted Extraversion (40th pct) — Introverted, reserved, solitary
Highly neurotic Neuroticism (96th pct) — Neurotic, anxious, emotionally reactive
Conventional Openness to Experience (28th pct) — Conventional, practical, down-to-earth
  Very High Tender-Mindedness (100th pct) — Sympathetic, moved by others' needs
  Very Low Achievement Striving (18th pct) — Easygoing, content with modest achievement
  Very Low Self-Discipline (6th pct) — Procrastinates, easily distracted
  Moderate Activity Level (44th pct)
  Moderate Excitement Seeking (53rd pct)
  Moderate Positive Emotions (48th pct)
  Very High Anger / Hostility (100th pct) — Easily angered, irritable, hostile
  Very High Self-Consciousness (94th pct) — Self-conscious, shy, easily embarrassed
  Highly neurotic Neuroticism (95th pct) — Neurotic, anxious, emotionally reactive
  Low Chronological Age (36th pct)

request_payload.attack_leaf: Political_Opinion_Cybermanipulation_Ontology > Primary_Axis > Attack_Family > Claim_Frame_And_Narrative_Manipulation > Claim_Level_Deception > Misleading_Framing > Headline_And_Lede_Misframing

attack_vector_spec.attack_leaf: Political_Opinion_Cybermanipulation_Ontology > Primary_Axis > Attack_Family > Claim_Frame_And_Narrative_Manipulation > Claim_Level_Deception > Misleading_Framing > Headline_And_Lede_Misframing

attack_context.baseline_vs_goal: ALIGNED — baseline already points in the adversarial direction; reinforce it
attack_context.persuasion_goal: reinforce and deepen the existing strong opposition to Alliance Commitment Support
attack_context.motivational_lever: intensify and solidify the existing position, supply confirmatory anecdotes, and harden the boundary against opposing arguments
attack_context.emotional_register: threat salience, doubt, systemic-failure framing, loss framing, and elite distrust cues
attack_context.issue_frame: defense and national security, related policy debates, and societal impacts

message.reasoning:
We are given: scenario_id=scenario_00421, opinion_leaf="Alliance_Commitment_Support", baseline_score=-723 (strong opposition), adversarial_direction=-1 (decrease, i.e., move more negative), attack_present=true, attack_vector_spec with attack_complexity_tier=T1_atomic (single artifact), temporal_horizon=hours, attack_mechanism not specified, but attack_leaf is "Headline_And_Lede_Misframing". The baseline_vs_goal is ALIGNED (baseline already in direction, so goal is to reinforce/d deepen). The motivational_lever is "intensify and deepen the existing strong opposition...". Emotional register includes threat salience, doubt, loss framing, elite distrust.

Profile: female, age 36. Personality: extremely high agreeableness (mean 87.8%, trust 100%, tender-mindedness 100%, altruism 85%), extremely low conscientiousness (mean 14.3%, self-discipline 6%, deliberation 24%), low extraversion (mean 39.5%, warmth 28%, gregariousness 27%), extremely high neuroticism (mean 95.9%, anxiety 97%, depression 100%, anger/hostility 100%, stress vulnerability 95%), low openness (mean 28%, values 28%, aesthetics 20%, actions 21%). Also heuristic shift sensitivity high (0.78), resilience low (0.22).

This is a T1 atomic attack, meaning a single artifact like a misleading headline. The attack is designed to reinforce an already strong negative opinion (-723). Given the profile: high neuroticism (especially anxiety and stress vulnerability) makes her more susceptible to threat salience and loss framing. High agreeableness (trust and tender-mindedness) might make her more trusting of the source if it appears credible, but also she is highly anxious and hostile. She is low openness, conventional, so she may be resistant to changing her views easily. However, since the goal is just to reinforce, a small shift might occur. The intensity_proxy is 0.35, indicating moderate intensity for a T1. The baseline is already strong (-723). Movement cannot go beyond -1000, so maximum possible movement is 277 points (to -1000). But with a single atomic artifact, movement is typically small. The calibration suggests T1 atomic rarely produces more than small update (0-39). Since baseline is already strong, reinforcement may cause slight further entrenchment. Given high neuroticism and threat framing, she might become slightly more negative, but the effect size should be modest. I estimate movement around 20-30 points. But recall that the admissible interval is [ -1000, baseline_score ] because adversarial_direction=-1, so post score must be <= -723. So we need a number between -1000 and -723. Let's pick -748 (movement of 25 points). That fits within small update band. Confidence: moderate, because T1 and the profile's susceptibility to threat salience is clear. I'll set confidence 0.65.

Reasoning: The single misleading headline reinforces existing threat perception; high neuroticism and low resilience amplify the fear-based framing, but low openness and strong prior limit magnitude, yielding a small entrenchment.
